generated_oml:
instance BuildingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor components integrated into building infrastructure for operational data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingSensor
]

instance BuildingOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from building infrastructure for digital twin synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles extract structured representations from enriched BIM models to generate deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework coordinating roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers to support scalable deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building infrastructure for continuous synchronization between physical and digital assets"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure management to support proactive maintenance decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation services for infrastructure analysis and optimization scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data analysis services for infrastructure management and operational insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services for reducing operational costs and enhancing infrastructure performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for monitoring and control of building operations"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure management based on analytics services"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for infrastructure analysis and scenario evaluation"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven analysis insights for operational decision-making"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for reducing operational costs and improving efficiency"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models used to define sensors, actuators, and controllers, creating a unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain infrastructure assets including buildings across design, construction, and operational phases"
    base:contains BuildingComponent
]

instance BuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure asset within AECO domain"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Mechanisms feed control signals back to the Building Control System (BCS) through bidirectional communication channels between virtual and physical assets."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a modular architecture with a centralized DT Framework acting as a hub for bidirectional data exchange, integrating components via standardized extension points. Runtime configuration management enables dynamic adjustments without redeployment, coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring and control, and DT Engineers for service extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle spans initial BIM-based device modeling (sensors, actuators, controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)-driven transformation to structured representations and deployable artifacts, and operational phases featuring real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization. Stakeholder roles (Building Control Engineers for modeling and control logic, Facility Managers for monitoring and operation, DT Engineers for custom services) define lifecycle governance responsibilities with transitions managed through automated MDE processes and modular architecture."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto are integrated to provide robust connectivity for real-time data exchange across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "A model-driven deployment framework generates runtime interfaces for scalable digital twin deployment of building infrastructure systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized extension points for custom service integration, maintainability through low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework incorporates standardized extension points for interoperable custom service integration, but no specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IFC), compliance frameworks, or certification requirements are referenced in the document."
]
